feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Business Technology Platform
feed.subtitle: SAP Business Technology Platform Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Build Process Automation and Work Zone Connection different subaccounts?
entry.content:
Hello experts,

we have been using SAP Build Process Automation  for a year to automate our processes. In the future we want to use the workflow capability of BPA. That's the reason why we want to connect Build Process Automation with Build Work Zone, standard edition. Is it necessary that both applications are located in the same subaccount in the BTP or can they have different subaccounts?

Kind regards,

Theresa

entry.title: Integrating Abby Vantage to SAP CPI
entry.content:
Hi all,

I am looking for sap connectors for Abby vantage to integrate with SAP CPI. Does anyone know or have any leads?

Thanks,

Prasanthi

entry.title: Implementing XSUAA for User Authentication in SAP CAP with HANA Database
entry.content:
Hello SAP Enthusiasts,

I am in the midst of architecting a SAP CAP-based backend coupled with SAP UI5 on the frontend. The objective is to weave in Authentication and Authorization functionalities, particularly utilizing XSUAA, while user credentials are securely stored in the HANA Cloud Database.

Imagine we have a login page. Upon entering their details and hitting the submit button, the system is designed to authenticate users against the records in the HANA Cloud Database. Successful authentication would result in the issuance of a token, which is then used to authorize subsequent API requests.

I would appreciate any insights or guidance on how to effectively implement this requirement.

entry.title: How to keep desktop agent session alive with unattended mode in RDP
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

How to keep desktop agent session alive always with unattended mode in RDP, after few hours if desktop agent is not in use it is getting disconnected in the RDP.

Could you please help me how I can keep the desktop Agent session alive always with unattended mode.

Thanks,

Rupesh

entry.title: SAP MDO Business Object Type Workforce Person: populate extension fields from PerPerson
entry.content:
Hey guys,
new day with MDI - new issues with MDI!

We have a working sandbox environment with SAP MDI receiving employee master data from SuccessFactors Employee Central. We're using SAP MDO Business Object Type "Workforce Person 3.5.0", which has a handful of custom fields customized under "Extension Fields". It is all working fine and the employee master data incl. the extension fields is successfully and correctly imported into the Workforce Person object until a field from SuccessFactors Employee Central personInfo (PerPerson) entity is mapped.

PROBLEM: how can fields from EC personInfo (e.g. Date of Birth/Place of Birth) be mapped to Workforce Person 3.5.0 ProfileDetails?
Example: I have added "Place of Birth" (personInfo-->placeOfBirth) as an extension field under ProfileDetails (sap.odm.workforce.ProfileDetails) {image001.png}.

Once the field was activated, I added the required picklist item with external Code "ProfileDetails_ext__personInfo_pob" to picklist BCUI_MAPPED_DOMAIN_ATTRIBUTE_NAME, to make the target field available for selection under "Manage Business Configuration" --> "personInfo" {image002.png}.

Then I went to "Manage Business Configuration" --> "personInfo" --> Details for "Place of Birth", and selected the previously created target field name "ProfileDetails_ext__personInfo_pob" under "Mapped Domain Attribute Name" {image003.png}.

My expectation is, that the extraction Job then derives the target field in ODM based on the picklist item selected under "Mapped Domain Attribute Name". So the field value for Place of Birth should be mapped to "ProfileDetails" --> "ext__personInfo_pob".

What happens is, the extraction report is failing with message: "ProfileDetails_ext__personInfo_pob in the path is invalid" {image004.png}.

Checking the payload of the failed job execution, it indeed looks a bit weird {image005.png}, because the extension field for Place of Birth is not listed under the ProfileDetails section like the other extension fields (e.g. gender, nationality) but creates an own section.

It almost seems to me, that the setup itself in SAP MDI/MDO and EC are 100% correct but somehow the Integration Center Report behind the Business Scenario is extracting the queried data into a wrong structure in the Payload, which is then failing when handed over to the MDI API.

Questions:

  • Does anyone have an explanation for this behavior?
  • Does anyone ever successfully map a personInfo field to an extension field under ProfileDetails?
  • Any known workarounds for this?

Thanks for any kind of advice, pointing me into the right direction!
Cheers!

entry.title: CAP vs. Spring Boot
entry.content: Whats the benefit of using SAP CAP instead of Java Spring Boot with SAP Cloud SDK especially if we use Angular as front end  instead of UI5

entry.title: IDOCs (INVOIC02) basic type
entry.content:
I have copied INVOIC02 and created ZINVOIC02. My question is: Are all user exits from INVOIC02 also automatically copied into ZINVOIC02 new custom type? 
OR do I need to make developments/implementations in order for that to work?

entry.title: SAP IAS User group patch action is not working from Build Process Automation
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We are using the Identity directory API for the Patch action of the group. I have created the user using IAS action, wanted to move the user to specific Group. From Business accelerator Hub I am able to move the user to desired group, but from action group it is giving me error 400.

I am following the below steps:

  1. Login to SAP Build Process lobby, navigate to action section.
  2. Add the Identity provider API Action Project.
  3. Add the Group Patch Action to the project
  4. And execute the Patch action with provided input as Group Id 
  5. And operation as "xxxxx", path as "xxxxx" and value as "xxxxx"

    Attached screenshot for your reference:

     

    ERROR: 

Could you please help me or any suggestion to resolve this issue?

Thanks,

Rupesh

entry.title: How can the manifest be dynamically provided in Component.js?
entry.content:
Is it possible to modify manifest or provide a new manifest dynamically in component.js?
Any example or reference is available?

Or any hooks available to change manifest dyanmically?

Note: Want to change routes pattern and targets.

entry.title: Unable to create BTP trial account
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am having trouble creating BTP trial account since yesterday.

Anyone having any idea or experiencing similar issue?.

Regards,

Rahul R

entry.title: Can I add some sections into my MDK Project
entry.content:
Hi there,

Could you tell me how to create a new Fiori section when I want to classify it into some groups according to the Fiori application pages that I made in the MDK project?

I found some articles that can help me set up some details while using S/4HANA, but now I'm using SAP Business App Studio to develop a new project.

 

Can any ideas or links help me develop it using sections, like the tiles in the yellow fields?

Thanks for your response.

 

SAP Business Application Studio SAP Fiori SAP Fiori Elements  mobile development kit client

entry.title: SAP BTP Tutorial with HANA DB and FIORI front end with VS code
entry.content:
Hello! I am trying to create a CDS project with VS Code that connects to HANA DB, uses XSUAA and exposes data through a FIORI app. Preferably to use multiple FIORI apps that can connect to the same CDS backend service. I tried following a few tutorials from SAP but none of them worked. Is there any clean tutorial / documentation that I can follow to achieve the above scope?

Thanks!

entry.title: How to establish trust between two XSUAA protected approuters?
entry.content:
Hello community,

we are trying to nest one SAPUI5 component in another. While this is usually easily done by leveraging the component container control, our target setup seems to be challenging.

Application 1 is served via. a standalone approuter and nests Application 2 which is deployed to the HTML5 Application Repository and is served via the managed approuter. Both applications are XSUAA protected use the same identity provider.

 

The challenge seems to be the authorization part in the nesting process. The request from Application 1 to Application 2 always results in an HTTP 401, no matter the destinations authentication type and configuration.

Application 2 needs to be XSUAA protected to be able to use Principal Propagation to call ERP resources.

Is this setup technically possible? If so, how can we achieve it?

Thank you in advance,
Daniel

entry.title: contract test for (node js library without any endpoint)
entry.content:
We have a node js library which do not have any endpoint or apis. Various node microservices consume this library and use these functions to send or export logs/span/metrics data. We want to write contract test for our library.

How can we do this?

Is it possible to write test to validate the functions remain unchanged w.r.t functionName, arguments, returnType, modifiers.

entry.title: System Applications Converison?
entry.content:
Hi All

Given the deprecation of SAC Applications, many developers will be looking to move their content over to Optimised Stories (if they haven't already done so).

My question is whether we need to convert the system applications ourselves?  i.e., those used for usage, statistics, system overview, etc or is SAP planning an update and roll-out of these in the future?

Thanks
Ian

entry.title: SAP BPA - Retrying a process instance does not trigger the actions
entry.content:
Hi all,

I've done an interesting observation the past week on the Build Process Automation monitoring tool - especially the 'Retry' functionality.

When retrying a process instance containing an action then the action is not execute instantly. Below are screen shots from an instance where a process is retried after action failure. But upon retrying the instance the action is not triggered - at least not within the first hour. 

Below is another example on a process instance that was retried - Six hours later the action was triggered.  

Above logs are on the same process - but two different instances. The first step of the process is an action - so we are not pending multiple steps before executing the action. When no action failure occurs then the process instance is executed within seconds.

The issue seems to only to occur upon retrying a process instance. 

Has anyone done the same observations on the retry functionality?

entry.title: Adding a Value Help for a Standard field in Custom Business Object
entry.content:
Hi Members,

I've created a Custom business object with standard fields in it and one of the field needs a value help which is added by Association to Business Object. I tried referring to a blog 

Adding a Value Help for Custom Business Object fie... - SAP Community

But after following the steps mentioned in it, the value help is not providing any value.

Could anyone help in explaining on how to achieve this

@Cloud @ABAP

entry.title: API API_MATERIAL_DOCUMENT throwing 'Provide Line-IDs' error during a POST call with Custom Fields
entry.content:
Hi Community ,

I have created a custom field with Business Context as 'Material Document Item' in Custom Fields App in SAP S/4 HANA Public Cloud . I have enabled it for ODATA Service API_MATERIAL_DOCUMENT_SRV and at GUI level it is disabled.

When i do a GET call at Header Level (Extending to Line Item) using API Material Documents - Read, Create ; it successfully gives me the Material Document details with header and line items(along with the created custom fields). But when i do a POST call for posting a material document by putting custom fields in to the Payload, i get an error message saying 'Provide line ID's when using Business Context MATERIALDOCUMENTITEM'.

POST call works fine if i remove the custom field.

Attached screenshots of Successful GET Call with Custom fields, payload Used for POST call and Error message during POST call.

Please suggest me a solution to resolve above mentioned issue.

entry.title: Custom fields are greyed out when posting Material Document from Delivery APP.
entry.content:
Hello ,

My Business requirement involves posting a material document either from MIGO screen for some of the movement types or From Delivery App(VL32N or VL02N) depending whether a  delivery is created using a PO or a STO in SAP S/4 HANA Public Cloud.

Also, we have created custom Fields in Custom Fields APP in following 2 ways :

1. Creating a standalone custom field for Business Context Material Document Item.

2. Creating a Custom Field for Business Context Procurement: Purchasing Document Item and then enabling business scenarios for Delivery and Material Document respectively. This feature helps us to flow the custom field value from PO to material without any code.

Issue i am facing is listed below for both the scenarios :

A.] Scenario 1 : Posting material document from MIGO Screen.

 When a material document is processed using MIGO app, custom logic written in BADI Change Item Data in Material Documents MMIM_ITEM_PROVIDE_DATA is triggered and user has complete freedom to functionalities like auto populate/grey out etc. for standalone custom fields created using approach 1 mentioned above but the extended custom fields(approach 2) are greyed out . I was expecting these fields to be enabled so user can get values from F4 help. Currently these are greyed out and take some value from random PO/STO. Screen Shot ref : CF_MIGO

B.] Scenario 2 : Posting material document from Delivery Screen(eg. Post Goods Receipt).

When a material document is created using Inbound/Outbound Delivery App; the extended custom field possess values from preceding PO/STO document but the standalone Custom fields(approach 1) created are greyed out here .Screen Shot ref(CF_Preceding_Doc) Also, i tried calling class for above mentioned Materiel BADI in Delivery BADI Modify LE_SHP_SAVE_DOCUMENT_PREPARE Standard and Custom Fields for Delivery Header and Items and was able to insert data in to changing parameter but its not getting committed.

entry.title: List binding to input of UI5 task as approval form not working
entry.content:
Hi Community,

I am trying to bind list of process context to the approval form which is an imported UI5 task that has a list input. The field is enabled and I am able to bind the list but not the individual fields.

Even if I try to map the individual fields it does not work. Below is declaration of the input in manifest.

But with a usual approval form there is no issue to bind.

Please suggest.
